title: Calamity
description: Whenever you play an Attack, add a random Attack into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
smart_description: Whenever you play an Attack, add {Amount:plural:a random Attack|[blue]{}[/blue] random Attacks} into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
notes: Counter power that adds random Attack cards from your character's card pool to your hand whenever an Attack is played. The number added equals the power's stack amount.
